Profiling immunoglobulin repertoires across multiple human tissues using RNA sequencing. Nat Commun. 2020 Jun 19;11(1):3126. doi: 10.1038/s41467-020-16857-7. Erratum in: Nat Commun. 2020 Sep 4;11(1):4499. doi: 10.1038/s41467-020-18509-2. PMID: 32561710; PMCID: PMC7305308.
